messages.content:
The problem becomes all the more significant when it becomes apparent 
that the present trend on Martha's Vineyard runs counter to the long-range 
movement of these diphthongs over the past two hundred years. And 
while this sound change is not likely to become a phonemic change in the 
foreseeable future, it operates in an area where far-reaching phonemic 
shifts have taken place in the past. It is, in effect, the unstable residue of 
the Great Vowel Shift. translate into Chinese
当我们意识到马撒葡萄园（Martha's Vineyard）目前的趋势与这些元音双元音在过去两百年里的长期运动方向背道而驰时，这个问题变得更为显著。尽管这种音变在可预见的将来不太可能成为音位变化，但它却发生在历史上曾经发生过深远音位转变的地区。可以说，它是大元音移位（Great Vowel Shift）不稳定残留物的体现。

3. The history of centralized diphthongs 
It seems generally agreed that the first element of the diphthong fai/ was 
amid-central vowel in 16th- and 17th-century English.I9 We may assume 
that when Thomas Mayhew first took possession of his newly purchased 
property of Martha's Vineyard in 1642, he brought with him the pronunciation [;:n] in right, pride, wine and wife. The later history of this vowel 
in America indicates that [;,1] continued to be the favored form well into 
the 19th century. translate into Chinese

3. 中央化双元音的历史
似乎普遍认为，在16世纪和17世纪的英语中，双元音fai/的第一个元素是一个中央元音。我们可以假设，当托马斯·梅休（Thomas Mayhew）在1642年首次占有他新购买的玛莎葡萄园（Martha's Vineyard）地产时，他带来了right, pride, wine和wife这些单词中的发音[ᴀ]。这个元音在美国的后续历史表明，[ᴀ]继续作为受青睐的形式一直延续到19世纪。

When we examine the records of the LANE, we find that centralized fai/ 
was a healthy survivor in the speech of the Atlas informants.21 We find it 
scattered throughout the rural areas of New England, and strongly entrenched in the Genesee Valley of western New York. It had disappeared 
completely from the Midland, but was quite regular-before voiceless consonants-in both the Upper and Lower South. This differential effect of 
voiceless and voiced following consonants was only a directing influence in 
the North, but stood as a regular phonetic rule in the South. On Martha's 
Vineyard, as on neighboring Nantucket and Cape Cod, centralized /ai/ was 
frequently recorded. 
The history of fauf differs from that of fai/ more than our general expectations of symmetry would lead us to predict. There is reason to believe 
that in England the lowering of fauf was considerably in advance of /ai/, 
and it is not likely that the same Thomas Mayhew used j;,vj in house and out.22 The American evidence of the late 18th and 19th centuries, as 
summed up by Krapp, points to [ou] as the conservative, cultured form, 
giving way to [au] or [au], with the rural New England form as [reu] or 
[w].23 The Linguistic Atlas records show only a hint of parallelism of fail 
and fau/. 24 We find [;m] mainly in eastern Virginia, before voiceless con· 
sonants, with some small representation in upstate New York, but the 
principal New England form of [au] stood out against a background of 
rural and recessive [reu]. Martha's Vineyard shows very little centralization 
of fau/ in the LANE maps. translate into Chinese\

当我们检查LANE（Linguistic Atlas of New England）的记录时，我们发现中央化的fai/在地图资料提供者的言语中是一个健壮的幸存者。我们发现它分散在新英格兰的农村地区，并且在纽约西部的Genesee山谷深深根植。它已经从米德兰完全消失，但在上南部和下南部，它在无声辅音之前相当常见。这种无声和有声辅音之后差异的影响只是在北部起导向作用，但在南部则成为常规的音韵规则。在玛莎葡萄园，和邻近的楠塔基特岛与科德角一样，中央化的/ai/被经常记录下来。

fauf的历史与fai/相比较，与我们对称性的一般预期相比有更多的不同。有理由相信，在英格兰，fauf的降低比/ai/领先不少，且不太可能是同一个托马斯·梅休在house和out中使用[jou]。晚18世纪和19世纪美国的证据，如Krapp总结的，指向[ou]作为保守的、有文化修养的形式，然而给位于[au]或[ao]，其中新英格兰乡村的形式为[reu]或者[əu]。语言地图的记录只显示了faif和fauf的稍微相似。我们主要在弗吉尼亚东部找到[ou]，出现在无声辅音前，并且在纽约州上部有一些小的代表性，而主要的新英格兰形式[au]与乡村和衰退的[reu]形成对比。在玛莎葡萄园的LANE地图中，fauf的中央化显示得非常少。

This brief review indicates that the isolated position of /auf has facilitated 
phonetic variation on a truly impressive scale. The first element has ranged 
from [1] to [o], from [s] to [o] all within the same general structural 
system. Perhaps one reason why fail has not shown a similar range of 
variation is the existence of another up-gliding diphthong, /.,ij. 25 In any 
case, as the stage is set for our present view of Martha's Vineyard 
diphthongs, /ai/ is well centralized, but /auf is not. It may be too strong a 
statement to say that this represents the phonetic heritage of the seven· 
teenth century Yankee settlers of the island, but we may venture to say that 
we have no evidence of any intervening events which disturbed the original 
pattern.  translate into Chinese

这简短的回顾表明，/auf的孤立位置促进了真正令人印象深刻的音变范围。其第一要素从[ɪ]变到[o]，从[æ]变到[ɒ]，都存在于同一个大致的结构体系之内。也许fail没有显示出类似的变化范围的一个原因是存在另一个上滑双元音/ɔɪ。无论如何，为我们目前对玛莎葡萄园双元音的看法设置舞台的时候，/ai/非常中央化，但/auf却不是。说这代表了十七世纪在岛上定居的美国北方移民的语音遗产或许言之过早，但我们可以敢于说，我们没有任何证据显示有任何中间发生的事件打扰了原始的模式。

In addition to the formal interview, observations were made in a great 
many casual situations: on the streets of Vineyard Haven and Edgartown, 
in diners, restaurants, bars, stores, docks, and many places where the 
general sound of public conversation could be noted, if not effectively recorded. But these notations only served as a supplementary check on the 
tape-recorded interviews. The basic information was gathered in the course 
of 69 interviews with native island speakers made in three periods: August 
1961, late September-October 1961, January 1962. These 69 interviews 
provide the basis for the discussion to follow. 
The sixty-nine speakers, somewhat more than I% of the population, represent a judgment sample of the community of native residents, and the 
groups which are important in the social life and value systems of the 
island. The sampling is proportional to area rather than population: 40 are 
up-islanders, and only 29 are from down-island, though over 70% of the 
people live down-island. The most important occupational groups are 
represented: 14 in fishing, 8 in farming, 6 in construction, 19 in service 
trades, 3 professionals, 5 housewives, 14 students. The three main ethnic 
groups are represented: 42 of English descent, 16 Portuguese and 9 Indian.  translate into Chinese

除了正式采访外，还在许多非正式场合进行了观察：在葡萄园港（Vineyard Haven）和埃德加镇（Edgartown）的街道上，餐馆、饭店、酒吧、商店、码头以及其他许多公共对话的普遍声音能够被注意到，即使它们不能被有效地录制下来。但这些记号仅作为对磁带录音采访的补充检查。基础信息是在进行了69次采访中收集的，对象是本岛的土著居民，采访分为三个时段进行：1961年8月，1961年9月末至10月，1962年1月。这69次采访为接下来的讨论提供了基础。

这六十九位发言者稍微超过岛上人口的1%，代表了本地居民社区的判断样本，以及在岛上的社会生活和价值体系中重要的群体。样本采集与区域成正比，而不是与人口成正比：其中40人来自上岛，29人来自下岛，尽管超过70%的人居住在下岛。最重要的职业群体得到了代表：14人从事捕鱼，8人从事农业，6人从事建筑业，19人从事服务行业，3名专业人士，5位家庭主妇，14名学生。三个主要的民族群体都有代表：42名英国后裔，16名葡萄牙裔和9名印第安人。

5. Scales of measurement 
An important step was to construct a reliable, inter-subjective index to 
the degree of centralization. In the original transcriptions of the taperecorded interviews28 a six-point scale of height of the first element was 
used, ranging from the standard New England form [a1] to the fully 
centralized [:n]. Such a transcription was intended to push the distinctions 
noted to the limits of auditory discrimination. This corresponded to the 
practice of the LANE, in which the same number of degrees of height can be symbolized. However, it was recognized that such fine distinctions 
could probably only be reproduced consistently by individuals who had 
attained a high degree of convergence, and then over a very short time span. 
Independent instrumental measurements were used to reduce the scale 
by objective criteria, and to give a certain degree of objective validity to the 
entire system of transcription.  translate into Chinese

5. 测量尺度
一个重要的步骤是构建一个可靠的、互主观性指标来衡量中央化的程度。在磁带录音采访的最初转录中，使用了一个六点高度尺度来衡量第一个元素的高度，这一尺度范围从标准新英格兰形式[aɪ]到完全中央化的[ɑ̈]。这样的转录旨在将注意到的区别推向听觉辨别的极限。这与LANE（Linguistic Atlas of New England）的做法相对应，在LANE中，相同数量的高度程度可以用符号表示。然而，人们认识到，这样精细的区别可能只有那些达到了高度一致性的个体，并且是在很短的时间跨度内才能一致地复现。独立的仪器测量被用来以客观标准减少量表，并为整个转录系统赋予一定程度的客观有效性。

Acoustic spectrograms were made of eighty instances of fai/ as spoken 
and recorded by seven different Vineyarders.29 A study of the assembled 
formant patterns indicated that one particular point in time might be best 
suited for measuring the degree of height of the first element of the 
diphthong. This is shown in Figure 2, as the point where the first formant reaches a maximum. Measurements of the first and second formant 
positions at this point seemed to correspond well to the formant measurements for steady state vowels [a] to [a] in Peterson and Barney's vowel 
studies. translate into Chinese
使用声谱图对七个不同马撒葡萄园居民所说和所录音的八十个例子中的fai/进行了分析。研究汇总的共振峰模式表明，有一个特定的时间点可能最适合测量双元音第一个元素的高度程度。这在图2中显示为第一个共振峰达到最大值的点。在这个点上对第一和第二共振峰位置的测量似乎与Peterson和Barney的元音研究中[a]至[ɑ]的稳定状态元音的共振峰测量十分吻合。

The eighty measurements were then plotted on a hi-logarithmic scale, 
with abscissa and ordinate corresponding to first and second formants. 
The original impressionistic transcriptions were then entered for each 
measurement, and the result examined for clear separation of impressionistic levels. On the whole, the stratification was good: the impressionistic ratings with more open first elements showed higher first formant and lower second formant readings. However, the separation of grades 2 
from 3, and 4 from 5, were not as clear as the others. A reduced four-step 
scale was then established, and the resulting correlation shown in Figure 3, 
and the table below. translate into Chinese
然后，这八十次测量结果被绘制在一个对数尺度上，横坐标和纵坐标分别对应于第一和第二共振峰。接着为每次测量输入最初印象主义的转录，并检查印象级别的清晰分隔情况。总体而言，分层效果很好：具有更开放第一要素的印象主义评级显示出更高的第一共振峰和更低的第二共振峰读数。然而，2级和3级，4级和5级之间的区分并不像其他级别那么明显。于是，建立了一个简化的四步尺度，并在图3和下面的表格中显示出相应的相关性。

Figure 3 shows the values for Scale II mapped on the hi-logarithmic scale. 
This is a satisfactory result, with good separation of the four grades of 
centralization. We have also obtained some justification for the use of the 
first formant maximum in measuring spectrograms, rather than the second 
formant minimum. Since the lines separating the four grades parallel the 
second-formant axis more than the first-formant axis, we have a graphic 
demonstration that our phonetic impressions are more sensitive to shifts in 
the first formant than the second. 
When this display was originally planned, there was some question as to 
whether it would be possible to map many different speakers on the same 
graph. We know that there are significant differences in individual frames 
of formant reference. Small children, for instance, appear to have vowel 
triangles organized at considerably higher frequencies than adults. The 
seven speakers whose readings are displayed in Figure 3 are all male; four 
are high school students, aged 14 to 15. But the other three are adults, 
from 30 to 60 years old, with widely different voice qualities.  translate into Chinese

图3展示了在对数尺度上映射的第二量表（Scale II）的值。这是一个令人满意的结果，四个中央化等级的分隔很好。我们还获得了一些理由来支持使用第一共振峰最大值来衡量声谱图，而不是第二共振峰最小值。由于分隔四个等级的线更多地平行于第二共振峰轴而不是第一共振峰轴，我们有了一个图形证明，说明我们的语音印象对第一共振峰的变化更为敏感。

在最初计划这个展示时，有一个疑问，即是否可能将许多不同发言者映射到同一张图上。我们知道，个体在共振峰参照框架中存在显著差异。例如，小孩子的元音三角形似乎在比成人高得多的频率上被组织。图3中展示的七位发言者都是男性；其中四位是高中学生，年龄在14到15岁之间。但其他三位是成年人，年龄从30到60岁不等，声音质量也大相径庭。

Ideally, if we were studying the acoustic nature of the faif and fauf 
diphthongs, we would want a more uniform group of speakers. Secondly, 
we would ask for better and more uniform recording conditions: one recording was outdoors, two were in living rooms, four in an empty conference room. However, since the object of the testing was to lend objective 
confirmation to an impressionistic scale of discrimination, it is only realistic 
to use a range of recordings as varied as the body of material on which the 
entire study is based. Absence of separation of the four grades in Figure 3 might then have indicated only defects in instrumental technique, but a 
positive result can hardly be derived from such a bias.  translate into Chinese

理想情况下，如果我们正在研究fai和fau双元音的声学特性，我们会希望发言者群体更加均匀。其次，我们会要求更好且更均一的录音条件：一次录音是在户外，两次在客厅中，四次在一个空荡的会议室里。然而，由于测试的目的是为印象主义歧视尺度提供客观证实，使用与整个研究基础上的材料体一样多样化的一系列录音才是现实的。如果图3中四个等级没有分离，那可能只表明了仪器技术的缺陷，但从这种偏差中得出积极结果是不可能的。

It is interesting to note that measurements from no one speaker are 
distributed over more than half of Figure 3, and some speakers are 
sharply limited to a narrow sector-still occupying portions of all the 
grades of centralization. For instance, the highly centralized speaker EP, 
aged 31, accounts for all of the readings in the lower right portion marked 
with a o sign: 0°, 2°, etc. He shows no readings higher than 650 or 1500 cps. 
On the other hand, speaker OW, aged 15, also highly centralized, accounts 
for the upper left portion; his readings, marked with a + sign, are all higher 
than 625 or 1550 cps. Again, speaker GM, aged 15, is limited to a belt 
from lower left to upper right, filling the space between the two just mentioned. Despite the differences in· vowel placement, these seven speakers 
utilize the same dimension to produce the effect of centralized or open 
vowels: widely separated formants for centralized vowels, adjacent formants for open vowels. The opposition, though not distinctive, is clearly 
seen as ranging from compact to (relatively) non-compact. 
This display then indicates for us that the reduced impressionistic scale 
shows good stratification in terms of physical parameters, and we may proceed to employ such ratings with some confidence in their validity.  translate into chinese

有趣的是，我们注意到没有一个发言者的测量结果分布在图3的一半以上，有些发言者的范围尽管涉及到了中央化的所有等级，却严格限定在一个狭窄的区域内。例如，高度中央化的发言者EP，31岁，占据了右下部分全部读数，其处所标记的符号为圆圈：0°、2°等。他的读数没有高于650或1500赫兹。另一方面，同样高度中央化的15岁发言者OW，则占据了左上部分；他的读数，标有加号，都高于625或1550赫兹。再比如，15岁的GM只局限于从左下到右上的一个区域，填充了刚提到的两位发言者之间的空间。尽管这七位发言者在元音放置上各有不同，但他们利用同一个维度来产生中央化或开放元音的效果：中央化元音的共振峰相距较远，开放元音的共振峰紧邻。尽管这种对立并不显著，但清晰地展示了从紧凑到（相对地）不紧凑的范围。

因此，这个展示告诉我们，简化的印象主义量表在物理参数方面显示出良好的层次分明性，我们可以相当有信心地使用这样的评级。

6. The linguistic environment 
We can now plot the distribution of centralized forms for each speaker. 
This is done for each of the 69 interviews on a chart such as is shown in 
Figure 4. We find that these charts fall into three basic types:  transalte into Chinese

6. 语言环境
我们现在可以为每位发言者绘制出中央化形式的分布图。这项工作是针对69次采访中的每一次在图表上完成的，如图4所示。我们发现这些图表分为三种基本类型：
